# allinkl_dns_record (Resource)

Manages a single DNS record in a zone hosted at all-inkl.com (KAS).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "allinkl_dns_record" "www" {
  zone = "example.com"
  name = "www"
  type = "A"
  data = "203.0.113.10"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String) Record payload, e.g. an IP address, hostname or TXT content.
- `type` (String) Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, NS, CAA, ... The KAS API cannot change the type in place, so changing it forces a new record.
- `zone` (String) Zone host, e.g. `example.com`. Changing it forces a new record.

### Optional

- `aux` (Number) Auxiliary value: MX priority or SRV priority. 0 for other types.
- `name` (String) Record name relative to the zone (e.g. `www`). Empty string for the zone apex.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Record id assigned by KAS.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import allinkl_dns_record.www example.com/12345
```
